data.name: Common.ComingInPhase3
data.value: This section will be implemented in Phase 3 (Core XML generation).

data.name: Palette.NoResults
data.value: No matches. Try a different search.

data.name: Help.Footer
data.value: Press ? any time to reopen this.

data.name: Landing.Tagline
data.value: Build your Windows answer file, visually - offline and instantly.

data.name: Landing.Status
data.value: 🟧 Pre-alpha - the editor is under active development.

data.name: Landing.Wizard.Description
data.value: Step-by-step guided setup. Answer one question at a time, or start from a preset.

data.name: Landing.Advanced.Description
data.value: Full manual control. Every option in one place, with a live XML preview.

data.name: Landing.Docs.Description
data.value: Read-only reference for every autounattend.xml option, what it does and how.

data.name: Landing.Import.ComingSoon
data.value: Importing existing .xml files is coming in a later phase.

data.name: Wizard.Entry.Prompt
data.value: Pick how you want to start.

data.name: Wizard.Guided.Description
data.value: Walks you through every decision with explanations along the way.

data.name: Wizard.Presets.Description
data.value: Pick a ready-made template for a common scenario and tweak from there.

data.name: Wizard.Presets.Prompt
data.value: Pick a template to populate your configuration.

data.name: Wizard.Review.Subtitle
data.value: Verify your settings before downloading the answer file.

data.name: Wizard.Review.DownloadStub
data.value: XML generation is coming in Phase 3 - the download button is disabled for now.

data.name: Step.Language.Description
data.value: Pick the Windows display language and your country / region.

data.name: Step.Disk.Description
data.value: Choose how Windows Setup will partition the target drive (GPT / MBR, EFI size, recovery).

data.name: Step.Users.Description
data.value: Create the first account and choose the first-logon behavior.

data.name: Step.Privacy.Description
data.value: Disable data collection and tune express-settings defaults.

data.name: Step.Finish.Description
data.value: Head to the review screen to verify and download your autounattend.xml.

data.name: Preset.CleanHomePc.Description
data.value: Debloat, local account, GPT, en-US. For personal use without Microsoft account.

data.name: Preset.VmProxmox.Description
data.value: VirtIO drivers, QEMU guest agent, no bloatware. Ideal for Proxmox or KVM.

data.name: Preset.Corporate.Description
data.value: Pro edition, no first-logon, domain-ready placeholder, privacy-first defaults.

data.name: Preset.Minimal.Description
data.value: The smallest possible answer file for the fastest unattended install.

data.name: Region.DisplayLanguage.Description
data.value: The language Windows uses for its UI: Settings, File Explorer, dialogs. Setup looks for a matching language pack in the install image.

data.name: Region.InputLanguage.Description
data.value: The keyboard layout active on first boot. Independent of the display language - a user in Germany might want English UI with a German keyboard.

data.name: Region.HomeLocation.Description
data.value: Country / region code used for date, currency, and measurement formatting, plus region-aware features like the Microsoft Store.

data.name: Section.region.Subtitle
data.value: Language, keyboard, and regional formatting Windows applies on first boot.

data.name: Advanced.Subtitle
data.value: Full manual control. All options in one place. Press Ctrl+Shift+X or the floating button to preview the XML.

data.name: Section.disk.Subtitle
data.value: How Windows Setup will partition, format, and target the install disk.

data.name: Disk.Mode.Description
data.value: Interactive lets Setup ask at install time. Auto wipe silently partitions the first disk. Custom runs a diskpart script you paste below.

data.name: Disk.Mode.AutoWipe
data.value: Auto wipe and partition the first disk

data.name: Disk.PartitionStyle.Description
data.value: GPT is required for UEFI boot and disks larger than 2 TB. MBR is legacy BIOS only.

data.name: Disk.EspSize.Description
data.value: Size of the EFI system partition. 100 MB minimum; 300 MB is the default and covers most bootloaders including BitLocker.

data.name: Disk.Recovery.Description
data.value: Where Windows Recovery Environment lives. Dedicated partition is Microsoft's default. Folder keeps it on C:. Remove frees ~800 MB but disables in-place recovery.

data.name: Disk.RecoverySize.Description
data.value: Size reserved for Windows RE. 1000 MB (schneegans default) fits the base image; Microsoft recommends 1024 MB+ for future updates.

data.name: Disk.CustomScript.Description
data.value: Full diskpart.exe script. Must contain ASSIGN LETTER=W (Windows) and ASSIGN LETTER=S (system) so Setup knows where to install.

data.name: Disk.CustomScript.Placeholder
data.value: SELECT DISK=0 CLEAN CONVERT GPT CREATE PARTITION EFI SIZE=300 FORMAT QUICK FS=FAT32 LABEL="System" ASSIGN LETTER=S ...

data.name: Disk.InstallDiskIndex.Description
data.value: Zero-based disk number. Leave as-is to let Setup pick the first available disk.

data.name: Disk.InstallPartitionIndex.Description
data.value: One-based partition number on the chosen disk. Leave as-is to auto-derive from the partition layout.

data.name: Section.edition.Subtitle
data.value: Which Windows edition to install and how Setup gets the product key.

data.name: Edition.KeyMode.Description
data.value: Generic keys install the edition unattended and activate later. Custom uses your own key. Interactive asks during Setup. From BIOS reads the OEM-embedded key.

data.name: Edition.ProductKey.Description
data.value: Five groups of five alphanumeric characters, e.g. AAAAA-BBBBB-CCCCC-DDDDD-EEEEE.

data.name: Edition.Edition.Description
data.value: Pick the SKU matching your install media. Windows Setup uses this to both select the image index and pick the right generic key when no custom key is given.

data.name: Section.source-image.Subtitle
data.value: Which image inside install.wim Setup applies to the target partition.

data.name: SourceImage.Mode.Description
data.value: Automatic lets Setup pick from the edition. By index points at a specific image. By name matches the display name inside the WIM.

data.name: SourceImage.ImageIndex.Description
data.value: One-based index as listed by dism /Get-ImageInfo. Typical install.wim files contain 1 to 11 images.

data.name: SourceImage.ImageName.Description
data.value: Full display name from the WIM, e.g. "Windows 11 Pro". Must match exactly; Setup matches are case-sensitive.

data.name: Section.windows-pe.Subtitle
data.value: How the Windows PE pre-install stage runs: default Setup, generated diskpart + DISM, or a custom .cmd script.

data.name: Pe.Mode.Description
data.value: Default runs the standard Windows Setup PE path. Generated emits a diskpart + DISM .cmd script. Custom replaces the entire stage with your own commands.

data.name: Pe.Disable8Dot3.Description
data.value: Strips legacy 8.3 names on the Windows volume. Saves a little space and marginally speeds up directory listings; breaks a handful of very old installers.

data.name: Pe.PauseBeforePartition.Description
data.value: Shows a confirmation prompt before diskpart wipes the disk. Useful when debugging a new configuration; uncheck for truly unattended installs.

data.name: Pe.PauseBeforeReboot.Description
data.value: Keeps the PE window open after DISM finishes so you can inspect logs before the machine reboots into Specialize.

data.name: Pe.CustomCmd.Description
data.value: Replaces the entire PE stage. You are responsible for partitioning, applying the image, and copying the autounattend.xml into C:\Windows\Panther.

data.name: Pe.CustomCmd.Placeholder
data.value: @echo off diskpart.exe /s X:\diskpart.txt dism.exe /Apply-Image ... bcdboot.exe W:\Windows /s S:

data.name: Docs.Subtitle
data.value: Read-only reference for every autounattend.xml option covered by preflight.xml.

data.name: Docs.Entry.ComingSoon
data.value: Detailed documentation for this topic is coming in a later phase.

data.name: Docs.Entry.UnknownDescription
data.value: The topic you requested does not exist.

data.name: Docs.Topic.Region.Description
data.value: Display language, input locale, home location, time zone.

data.name: Docs.Topic.Disk.Description
data.value: GPT vs. MBR, EFI size, recovery partition, custom diskpart scripts.

data.name: Docs.Topic.Users.Description
data.value: Local accounts, admin groups, first-logon behaviour, password policy.

data.name: Docs.Topic.Edition.Description
data.value: Product keys, edition selection (Home / Pro / Enterprise / Education).

data.name: Docs.Topic.Privacy.Description
data.value: Express settings, telemetry toggles, advertising ID, location services.

data.name: Docs.Topic.Security.Description
data.value: UAC, Defender, SmartScreen, RDP, Windows 11 requirement bypass.

data.name: Docs.Topic.Bloatware.Description
data.value: Remove preinstalled apps: Copilot, Cortana, Bing Search, Teams and more.

data.name: Docs.Topic.Tweaks.Description
data.value: File Explorer, taskbar, start menu, visual effects, long paths.

data.name: Docs.Topic.Vm.Description
data.value: VirtualBox Guest Additions, VMware Tools, VirtIO + QEMU agent, Parallels Tools.

data.name: NotFound.Message
data.value: The page you are looking for does not exist.
